antecedent_audit.evidence_policy: Existing direct notes and line locators remain pinned to each evidence_head_sha even when current_head_sha drifts.
antecedent_audit.publication_semantics: This inclusive cutoff freezes the evidence release; later publication or repository creation does not retroactively alter it.

classification_legend.U: unrelated to the RAPP source set

local_product.name: rapp-stack-cubby
local_product.truth: This working repository was absent from the public account inventory at the cutoff and is represented separately as the complete local product context.

methodology.assignment: Repository names are sorted case-insensitively, assigned zero-based sorted_index values, and sharded by sorted_index modulo 8.
methodology.authority_policy: rapp-spine, map, god, Bible, grail, and other indexes are navigation only and did not substitute for repository-local evidence.
methodology.cutoff_policy: existence_cutoff is an inclusive repository-created_at boundary and is distinct from the later observation window.
methodology.head_policy: Each current_head_sha is paired with its actual per-repository API response time. The capture is a bounded non-atomic observation window, not historical state at the existence cutoff.
methodology.inspection_policy: The twelve antecedent C/I or directly load-bearing drift records were inspected at the exact newly observed head across tree, README, spec/manifest, relevant implementation, license, and Pages. Later movement of five newly inspected repositories is recorded as post-window drift and does not rewrite their pinned inspection.
methodology.metadata_source: Authenticated GitHub REST API via gh; four explicit inventory pages retain request/response times, ETags, and body digests, and 307 head records retain individual query times and body digests.
methodology.mutation_policy: Read-only authenticated API and content inspection only; no repository mutation or private-repository evidence was used.
methodology.reuse_policy: Owner authorization covers the owner’s original code only. Third-party, fork, generated, vendored, and copied material still requires per-file license and provenance review before inclusion.
methodology.summary: Authenticated direct API inventory and individually timed exact-head observations over a bounded non-atomic window, followed by exact-head review of all twelve required antecedent drift repositories.

raw_inventory.canonicalization: UTF-8 RFC8259; sorted keys; compact separators
